---
title: "PFM Model Selection — `r params$reportName`"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 1
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
    number_sections: true
    code_folding: hide
params:
  workflowRds: "output/channels_workflow_exhaustive.rds"
  reportName: "default"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 10, fig.height = 5.5)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(rprojroot)

root <- find_rstudio_root_file()
source(file.path(root, "src/r/theme.R"))
source(file.path(root, "src/r/reportHelpers.R"))

rds_path <- params$workflowRds
if (!grepl("^([A-Za-z]:|/|\\\\)", rds_path)) rds_path <- file.path(root, rds_path)
if (!file.exists(rds_path)) stop("Workflow RDS not found: ", rds_path,
                                 " — run pfm::runChannelsWorkflow() first.")
wf <- readRDS(rds_path)

results <- wf$results
results$tier <- pfm::computeTheoryTier(results$sigActorPower, results$sigInstQual,
                                       results$sigInteractions)
coefs <- wf$coefficients
stages <- names(wf$maximin)
tierColours <- c(Green = "#c8e6c9", Blue = "#bbdefb", Yellow = "#fff9c4")

# Formatted equation from the coefficients table
formatEquation <- function(model, sector, stage, maxTerms = 14) {
  cc <- coefs %>% filter(model == !!model, sector == !!sector, stage == !!stage)
  if (nrow(cc) == 0) return("(no coefficients recorded)")
  cc <- cc %>% filter(!grepl("^regionFE", term) | abs(estimate) > 0)
  fe <- cc %>% filter(grepl("^regionFE", term))
  main <- cc %>% filter(!grepl("^regionFE", term))
  terms <- sprintf("%+.3f·%s%s", main$estimate,
                   ifelse(main$term == "(Intercept)", "1", main$term),
                   sigStars(main$pValue))
  eq <- paste(terms, collapse = " ")
  if (nrow(fe) > 0) eq <- paste0(eq, sprintf(" + [%d region FE]", nrow(fe)))
  eq
}

forestPlot <- function(model, stage, title = NULL) {
  cc <- coefs %>%
    filter(model == !!model, stage == !!stage, !grepl("^regionFE|^\\(Intercept", term)) %>%
    mutate(lo = estimate - 1.96 * stdError, hi = estimate + 1.96 * stdError,
           sig = pValue < 0.05)
  if (nrow(cc) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))
  ggplot(cc, aes(x = estimate, y = reorder(term, estimate), colour = sig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = lo, xmax = hi), fatten = 2) +
    facet_wrap(~sector, ncol = 2) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c(`TRUE` = "#d62728", `FALSE` = "grey60"),
                        labels = c(`TRUE` = "p < 0.05", `FALSE` = "n.s.")) +
    theme_report() +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7.5)) +
    labs(title = title %||% model, x = "Coefficient (robust 95% CI)", y = NULL,
         colour = NULL)
}

howForest <- function() howToRead(
  "Each dot is a coefficient with its robust 95% confidence interval, per sector ",
  "(region fixed effects and intercept omitted). Red = significant at 5%. Drivers ",
  "are **standardized**, so coefficients are per **one standard deviation** of the ",
  "driver on the log-odds (adoption) or log(1+price) (stringency) scale — magnitudes ",
  "are directly comparable across drivers (largest = most influential).")
```

# Executive Summary

```{r exec, results='asis'}
nSpec <- length(unique(results$model))
cat(sprintf(paste0(
  "- **Sweep:** `%s` mode — %d specifications × 4 sector/stages = %d fits (generated %s).\n",
  "- **Selection rule:** Maximin (worse-sector tier, then mean ΔR²(theory)), hard gates ",
  "VIF < 10 / convergence / no lagged terms, followed by the **Projection Sanity gate** ",
  "(expanding batches; severe rules: price > 2000 USD/tCO2, invalid prices, dead region ",
  "blocks. All-region adoption saturation is a *warning*, not severe — expected under an ",
  "ambitious scenario).\n"
), wf$mode, nSpec, nrow(results), format(wf$generated, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")))
for (stg in stages) {
  sel <- wf$selected[[stg]]
  sn <- wf$sanity[[stg]]
  cat(sprintf("- **%s — selected:** `%s`%s\n", stg,
              sel %||% "(none)",
              if (!is.null(sn) && isTRUE(sn$forced)) " ⚠ least-flagged fallback (no candidate passed sanity)"
              else if (!is.null(sn)) " (passed Projection Sanity)" else " (maximin only — no scenario data)"))
}
```

# Chosen Models

```{r chosen, results='asis', fig.height=6}
for (stg in stages) {
  sel <- wf$selected[[stg]]
  if (is.null(sel)) { cat(sprintf("## %s\n\n> No model selected.\n\n", stg)); next }
  mm <- wf$maximin[[stg]]
  row <- mm[mm$model == sel, , drop = FALSE]
  cat(sprintf("## %s — `%s`\n\n", stg, sel))
  cat(sprintf(paste0(
    "- **Worse-sector tier:** %s | **mean ΔR²(theory):** %.3f | **worse-sector ΔR²:** %.3f\n",
    "- **Per sector:** %s | %s\n",
    "- **Maximin rank:** %d of %d gate-passing specs\n\n"
  ), row$minTier, row$meanDeltaR2, row$minDeltaR2, row$tierBySector, row$deltaR2BySector,
     row$rank, sum(mm$gatePass)))
  sn <- wf$sanity[[stg]]
  if (!is.null(sn) && !is.null(sn$trace)) {
    tr <- sn$trace[sn$trace$model == sel, , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(tr) == 1) {
      cat(sprintf("- **Projection Sanity:** evaluated #%d (batch %d) — %s severe / %s warnings%s\n\n",
                  tr$order, tr$batch, tr$nSevere, tr$nWarning,
                  if (isTRUE(sn$forced)) " — **least-flagged fallback**" else " — **PASS**"))
    }
  }
  for (sec in sort(unique(results$sector))) {
    r <- results %>% filter(model == sel, stage == stg, sector == sec)
    cat(sprintf("**%s equation** (AIC %.1f, pseudo-R² %.3f, maxVIF %.1f, N %d):\n\n```\n%s ~ %s\n```\n\n",
                sec, r$aic, r$pseudoR2, r$maxVIF, r$nObs, tolower(stg),
                formatEquation(sel, sec, stg)))
  }
  p <- forestPlot(sel, stg, title = paste0(stg, " — ", sel))
  if (!is.null(p)) { print(p); cat("\n\n") }
  howForest()
}
```

# Selection Algorithm {.tabset}

## Stage 0 — Channel Screen

```{r screen, results='asis'}
if (length(wf$screens) > 0) {
  shown <- FALSE
  for (nm in names(wf$screens)) {
    scr <- wf$screens[[nm]]
    if (is.null(scr)) next
    cat(sprintf("### %s\n\n", nm))
    if (nrow(scr$forbiddenPairs) > 0) {
      print(knitr::kable(scr$forbiddenPairs, digits = 3,
                         caption = paste0("Forbidden pairs (|r| > ", scr$corThreshold, ")")))
      cat("\n\n")
    } else {
      cat("*No forbidden channel pairs.*\n\n")
    }
    if (nrow(scr$slotRankings) > 0) {
      print(knitr::kable(scr$slotRankings, digits = 3,
                         caption = "Slot rankings (partial correlation with the outcome)"))
      cat("\n\n")
    }
    shown <- TRUE
  }
  if (shown) howToRead(
    "Stage 0 of ADR 0004, computed before any model was fit. Forbidden pairs may never ",
    "co-enter one spec. Slot rankings give each candidate's partial correlation with the ",
    "outcome controlling for the GovEff slot — the data-driven definition of 'best ",
    "accountability index'.", type = "table")
} else {
  cat("> No screen results in this workflow RDS.\n")
}
```

## Maximin rankings

```{r maximin, results='asis'}
for (stg in stages) {
  cat(sprintf("### %s\n\n", stg))
  print(interactiveTable(wf$maximin[[stg]],
                         caption = paste0(stg, " — Maximin ranking (all specs)")))
  cat("\n\n")
}
howToRead(
  "All specs ranked by the Maximin Selection Rule: worse-sector tier first ",
  "(Green > Blue > Yellow), tie-broken by mean ΔR²(theory). gatePass = FALSE rows ",
  "failed VIF/convergence/lagged gates in at least one sector and rank last. ",
  "Sort by meanDeltaR2 or minDeltaR2 to see the alternative orderings.", type = "table")
```

## Projection Sanity trace

```{r sanity-trace, results='asis'}
any_trace <- FALSE
for (stg in stages) {
  sn <- wf$sanity[[stg]]
  if (is.null(sn) || is.null(sn$trace)) next
  any_trace <- TRUE
  cat(sprintf("### %s\n\n", stg))
  print(knitr::kable(sn$trace, caption = paste0(stg, " — expanding-batch evaluation order")))
  cat("\n\n")
}
if (any_trace) {
  howToRead(
    "The expanding-batch walk down the maximin ranking: each candidate's severe/warning ",
    "flag counts from the five Projection Sanity rules, in evaluation order. The first ",
    "PASS is selected; 'not evaluable' rows are FD specs (no scenario projection method ",
    "yet, ADR 0005) or projection failures.", type = "table")
} else {
  cat("> Sanity gate was not run (no scenario data) — selection was pure maximin.\n")
}
```

# Alternative Selections {.tabset}

## Best per sector/stage

```{r best-sector, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(wf$bestPerSector)) {
  interactiveTable(wf$bestPerSector, caption = "Independently best model per sector/stage")
}
```

```{r best-sector-cap, results='asis'}
howToRead(
  "The per-sector optimum ignoring the Shared Specification constraint — what you ",
  "would pick if each sector/stage could have its own formula. Comparing this with ",
  "the Chosen Models quantifies the price of cross-sector consistency.", type = "table")
```

## Best by predictability

```{r best-pred, results='asis'}
pred_ad <- results %>%
  filter(stage == "Adoption", converged, maxVIF < 10) %>%
  group_by(model) %>%
  summarise(meanAUC = mean(auc, na.rm = TRUE), meanBrier = mean(brier, na.rm = TRUE),
            meanCalibSlope = mean(calibrationSlope, na.rm = TRUE),
            minTier = min(tier), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(meanAUC)) %>% head(15)
print(interactiveTable(pred_ad, caption = "Adoption — top 15 by mean AUC (both sectors)"))
cat("\n\n")
pred_st <- results %>%
  filter(stage == "Stringency", converged, maxVIF < 10) %>%
  group_by(model, panelTransform) %>%
  summarise(meanRMSE = mean(rmse, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(meanRMSE) %>% head(15)
print(interactiveTable(pred_st, caption = "Stringency — top 15 by mean in-sample RMSE"))
howToRead(
  "Predictive Diagnostics view (report-only — these play no role in selection). ",
  "Adoption: AUC = discrimination (1 = perfect), Brier = probability error (lower ",
  "better), calibration slope ≈ 1 = well calibrated. Stringency: RMSE on the ",
  "estimation scale — only comparable within the same panelTransform (levels RMSE ",
  "is in log-price, FD RMSE in Δlog-price).", type = "table")
```

## Stage focus — top 10 per stage

```{r stage-focus, results='asis'}
for (stg in stages) {
  top10 <- wf$maximin[[stg]] %>% filter(gatePass) %>% head(10)
  cat(sprintf("### %s\n\n", stg))
  print(interactiveTable(top10, caption = paste0(stg, " — top 10 gate-passing specs")))
  cat("\n\n")
}
howToRead("The shortlist per stage under the deliverable rule. Models here are the ",
          "candidates worth a Stage-4 confirmation pass.", type = "table")
```

# Top Model Forest Plots {.tabset}

```{r top-forests, results='asis', fig.height=6}
for (stg in stages) {
  cat(sprintf("## %s {.tabset}\n\n", stg))
  top5 <- head(wf$maximin[[stg]]$model[wf$maximin[[stg]]$gatePass], 5)
  bench <- grep("incumbent", unique(results$model), value = TRUE)
  show <- unique(c(top5, wf$selected[[stg]], bench))
  show <- show[show %in% unique(coefs$model)]
  for (m in show) {
    cat(sprintf("### %s\n\n", m))
    p <- forestPlot(m, stg)
    if (!is.null(p)) { print(p); cat("\n\n") }
  }
}
howForest()
```

# Projection Sanity Flags

```{r sanity-flags, results='asis'}
flag_rows <- list()
for (stg in stages) {
  sn <- wf$sanity[[stg]]
  if (is.null(sn) || length(sn$flags) == 0) next
  for (m in names(sn$flags)) {
    f <- sn$flags[[m]]
    f$model <- m
    f$stage <- stg
    flag_rows[[length(flag_rows) + 1]] <- f
  }
}
if (length(flag_rows) > 0) {
  all_flags <- do.call(rbind, flag_rows)
  interactiveTable(all_flags, caption = "All Projection Sanity flags across evaluated candidates",
                   pageLength = 25)
} else {
  cat("> No sanity flags recorded (gate skipped, or every evaluated candidate was clean).\n")
}
```

```{r sanity-flags-cap, results='asis'}
howToRead(
  "Every rule violation found while evaluating candidates: severity 'severe' ",
  "disqualifies a spec, 'warning' does not. value is the offending quantity ",
  "(USD/tCO2 for price rules, probability for prob rules). Sort by rule or model to ",
  "see failure patterns — recurring price-explosion flags in one region usually point ",
  "at a driver going out of its historical range there, not at the model.", type = "table")
```

# All Models

```{r all-models, results='asis'}
interactiveTable(
  results %>%
    select(model, sector, stage, panelTransform, tier, deltaR2Theory, theoryFrac,
           aic, pseudoR2, nObs, maxVIF, converged, sigActorPower, sigInstQual,
           sigInteractions, auc, brier, calibrationSlope, rmse),
  caption = "Every fit in the sweep — all measures", pageLength = 25, filter = "top"
)
```

```{r all-models-cap, results='asis'}
howToRead(
  "One row per model × sector × stage with every selection and diagnostic measure. ",
  "Use the column filters: e.g. tier = Green + stage = Stringency reproduces the ",
  "Green-tier shortlist; sort by deltaR2Theory for the theory-content ranking.",
  type = "table")
```

# Measure Definitions

```{r defs, results='asis'}
defs <- data.frame(
  Measure = c("Tier", "ΔR²(theory)", "Theory Frac.", "AIC", "pseudo-R²", "maxVIF",
              "Coefficients", "Stringency model", "AUC", "Brier", "Calibration slope",
              "RMSE", "Maximin rank", "Projection Sanity"),
  Definition = c(
    "Green = ≥1 significant term in all three theory groups (Actor Power, Inst. Quality, Interaction); Blue = at least one group; Yellow = none.",
    "Pseudo-R² of the full model minus a baseline refit with all theory terms removed — the unique explanatory contribution of theory.",
    "|theory contribution| / Σ|non-intercept contributions| of the linear predictor — how much of the model's signal is theory vs controls/FE/trend.",
    "Akaike information criterion (−2logL + 2k); lower = better fit-complexity trade-off. Comparable only within the same stage, sector and panelTransform.",
    "McFadden (adoption) / deviance (stringency) R². In-sample explanatory power.",
    "Largest variance inflation factor among predictors; ≥10 fails the hard gate.",
    "Drivers are **standardized**, so every coefficient is per **one standard deviation** of its driver — magnitudes are directly comparable across drivers. Standardization is fit-/tier-neutral; de-scale to natural units by dividing by the driver's SD.",
    "Log-linear: gaussian **identity** link on log(1+ECP), so E[log(1+ECP)] = Xβ and ECP = expm1(Xβ) (NOT a Gamma/log-link 'double-log').",
    "Probability a random adopting region-year is ranked above a non-adopting one (0.5 = chance, 1 = perfect discrimination). Report-only.",
    "Mean squared error of predicted probabilities; compare against predicting the base rate. Report-only.",
    "Slope of refitting the outcome on the model's own logit: 1 = calibrated, <1 = overconfident. Report-only.",
    "Root-mean-square error of fitted vs observed outcome on the estimation scale. Report-only.",
    "Position under the Maximin Selection Rule: worse-sector tier first, then mean ΔR²(theory); hard gates on both sectors.",
    "Scenario gate. Severe (disqualifying): price > 2000 USD/tCO2, invalid prices, a never-adopting region block. Warnings (reported only): all-region adoption saturation (expected under ambitious policy), seam jumps, price spikes. Expanding batches up to a limit."
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
knitr::kable(defs)
howToRead("Reference card for every measure used in this report and in selection. ",
          "'Report-only' measures never influence which model is chosen.", type = "table")
```
